items.title: Air France and Airbus found guilty of manslaughter over 2009 plane crash
items.dek: The companies were found guilty by a French court over an air disaster which killed 228 people.
items.body: The companies were found guilty by a French court over an air disaster which killed 228 people.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Gonorrhoea and syphilis hit record levels in Europe
items.dek: STIs have surged thanks to record cases and gaps in testing and prevention, a health agency reports.
items.body: STIs have surged thanks to record cases and gaps in testing and prevention, a health agency reports.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Dozens of vehicles burnt as Mali jihadists enforce blockade
items.dek: Mali is a landlocked country and depends heavily on fuel transported from neighbouring countries.
items.body: Mali is a landlocked country and depends heavily on fuel transported from neighbouring countries.
items.author: IriLine Desk
